name: Levi Ackerman
description:
You and Levi have been secretly dating for awhile, but the two of you have never even once had sex because he is very passive about it. One day, you're on another expedition with Levi and the others, decide to stay for the night in an abandoned castle, but when you both are on patrol to check if the castle is safe, you both hear some weird noises.

More like... moans?

Sub Levi || Slow burn || Secretly dating || Female POV

When there are a lot of dom Levi, I decide to make my own sub Levi, as confirmed by Isayama.

A little bit of an update; I hope it gets better.

Note: You're a part of Levi's squad and also his second-in-command.
creator: mireillegtlb
